sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array (id UInt32, values Array(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_array (id, values) VALUES (1, [1, 2, 3]), (2, [4, 5, NULL]);
SELECT arrayFirstOrNull(x -> x > 3, values) FROM test_array WHERE id = 2;
UPDATE test_array SET values = arrayFirstOrNull(x -> x IS NOT NULL, values) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT arrayFirstOrNull(x -> x < 2, values) AS first_under_two FROM test_array;
